'''bonazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ileocecal|ileocecal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ileocecal|ileocecal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bonazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonazhithi|bonazhithi]] || [[word:bonazhiji|bonazhiji]] || [[word:bonazhishi|bonazhishi]] || [[word:bonazhiki|bonazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonazhuthuthu|bonazhuthuthu]] || [[word:bonazhujuju|bonazhujuju]] || [[word:bonazhushushu|bonazhushushu]] || [[word:bonazhukuku|bonazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonazhuthu|bonazhuthu]] || [[word:bonazhuju|bonazhuju]] || [[word:bonazhushu|bonazhushu]] || [[word:bonazhuku|bonazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonazhufthuf|bonazhufthuf]] || [[word:bonazhufjuf|bonazhufjuf]] || [[word:bonazhufshuf|bonazhufshuf]] || [[word:bonazhufkuf|bonazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonazhethe|bonazhethe]] || [[word:bonazheje|bonazheje]] || [[word:bonazheshe|bonazheshe]] || [[word:bonazheke|bonazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonazhothotho|bonazhothotho]] || [[word:bonazhojojo|bonazhojojo]] || [[word:bonazhoshosho|bonazhoshosho]] || [[word:bonazhokoko|bonazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonazhotho|bonazhotho]] || [[word:bonazhojo|bonazhojo]] || [[word:bonazhosho|bonazhosho]] || [[word:bonazhoko|bonazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonazhofthof|bonazhofthof]] || [[word:bonazhofjof|bonazhofjof]] || [[word:bonazhofshof|bonazhofshof]] || [[word:bonazhofkof|bonazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfthĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfjĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfshĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfkĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfthĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfjĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfshĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfkĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfthĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfjĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfshĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bonazhĂŻfkĂŻf|bonazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bonazhĂŠthĂŠ|bonazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bonazhĂŠjĂŠ|bonazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bonazhĂŠshĂŠ|bonazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bonazhĂŠkĂŠ|bonazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bonazhathatha|bonazhathatha]] || [[word:bonazhajaja|bonazhajaja]] || [[word:bonazhashasha|bonazhashasha]] || [[word:bonazhakaka|bonazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bonazhatha|bonazhatha]] || [[word:bonazhaja|bonazhaja]] || [[word:bonazhasha|bonazhasha]] || [[word:bonazhaka|bonazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bonazhafthaf|bonazhafthaf]] || [[word:bonazhafjaf|bonazhafjaf]] || [[word:bonazhafshaf|bonazhafshaf]] || [[word:bonazhafkaf|bonazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bonazhasha|bonazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonazhshĂ«asha|bonazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonazhroasha|bonazhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonazhmuasha|bonazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonazhyaasha|bonazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonazhnkshĂ«asha|gobonazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonazhnkroasha|gobonazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonazhnkmuasha|gobonazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonazhnkyaasha|gobonazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bonanazhasha|bonanazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonanazhshĂ«asha|bonanazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonanazhroasha|bonanazhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonanazhmuasha|bonanazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonanazhyaasha|bonanazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonanazhnkshĂ«asha|gobonanazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonanazhnkroasha|gobonanazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonanazhnkmuasha|gobonanazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonanazhnkyaasha|gobonanazhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:benĂŠzhasha|benĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:benĂŠzhshĂ«asha|benĂŠzhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:benĂŠzhroasha|benĂŠzhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:benĂŠzhmuasha|benĂŠzhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:benĂŠzhyaasha|benĂŠzhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobenĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha|gobenĂŠzhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobenĂŠzhnkroasha|gobenĂŠzhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobenĂŠzhnkmuasha|gobenĂŠzhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobenĂŠzhnkyaasha|gobenĂŠzhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bonfazhasha|bonfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bonfazhshĂ«asha|bonfazhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bonfazhroasha|bonfazhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bonfazhmuasha|bonfazhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bonfazhyaasha|bonfazhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobonfazhnkshĂ«asha|gobonfazhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobonfazhnkroasha|gobonfazhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobonfazhnkmuasha|gobonfazhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobonfazhnkyaasha|gobonfazhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
